info.name: CMS-Minimal apis
info.description:
This collection contains the core endpoints for a minimal CMS-style API focused on managing courses, students, and enrollments.

It is organized into three main sections:

- Course Endpoints: create, retrieve, update, and delete course records
    
- Student Endpoints: manage student-related operations
    
- Enrollment Endpoints: handle student course enrollment workflows, including enrolling, completing, dropping, and retrieving related course or student data
    

The requests in this collection use the `{{baseminimal}}` variable as the base URL, making it easier to run the same endpoints across different environments.
